_comment_existing_priors: Priors used in current BA-02 demo run. Sources updated to match standardised notebook citation format.

beta_is_reserved.source: CDA NB01 H3: RL 20.3x at rare -> 2.10 log-units in log1p space; BA-04 H1 posterior: +2.562 [+2.390, +2.707]; BA-02 posterior: +1.813 [+1.617, +2.015]

beta_format_count.source: CDA NB02 H2: partial rho=-0.077 after rarity control; BA-02 posterior: -0.225 [-0.254, -0.196]

beta_log_print.source: CDA NB02 H5: demand-driven reprinting paradox (more reprints -> higher price at <50 prints); BA-02 posterior: +0.139 [+0.119, +0.158]

beta_foil_premium.note: Applied to log(foil_premium). Negative: high foil_premium ratio -> lower base price (bulk cards have scarce foils; competitive staples have liquid foil markets). BA-04 H5 measures causal per-card foil effect (+0.362 log-units, 1.44x) which is a different quantity.
beta_foil_premium.source: EDA NB04: Spearman -0.334 (raw ratio); BA-02 posterior: -0.195 [-0.231, -0.158]

beta_is_full_art.source: CDA NB05 H4: 8.1x at rare; confirmed all rarities including common (2.3x); BA-04 H6 rare: +0.888 (2.43x); BA-02 posterior: +0.650 [+0.539, +0.762]

beta_is_legendary.note: CONDITIONAL on log_print being in the model. Unadjusted effect is NEGATIVE (BA-04 H2: -0.174 at rare, P>0=0%). Once log_print is controlled, legendary label carries a price premium because legendary cards are printed less per set — scarcity absorbed into log_print channel (BA-02: +0.344 [+0.282, +0.399], P>0=100%). Keep positive prior as long as log_print remains a covariate (B-08).
beta_is_legendary.source: CDA NB01 H2: unadjusted NEGATIVE; BA-02 log_print-controlled: POSITIVE

_comment_new_priors: Priors for confirmed features not yet in BA-02. Add to model before next production run.

beta_edhrec_saltiness.source: CDA NB02 H6: partial rho=+0.220 after rarity control; near-monotone saltiness-price gradient (D1 EUR0.16 -> D9 EUR1.59); independent from edhrec_rank

beta_log_edhrec_rank.note: Applied to log(edhrec_rank) after sentinel fill (NULL -> 31059). Higher rank number = less popular = lower price. Leakage confirmed SAFE: snapshotted daily in silver_meta_history, joined date-exact (MP-01 P-18).
beta_log_edhrec_rank.source: EDA NB04: partial Spearman -0.434 after rarity control; MI=0.299 (2nd highest feature)

beta_set_type.note: One-hot encoded with 'expansion' as reference category. Tiny categories (spellbook, arsenal) merged into 'other'. Prior mus derived from CDA NB02 H3 median log-unit deltas relative to expansion (EUR 0.18).

masterpiece.source: CDA NB02 H3: EUR 2.21 vs 0.18 expansion

masters.source: CDA NB02 H3: EUR 0.24 vs 0.18; reprint product — supply increase depresses prices

other.source: Catch-all for merged rare categories (spellbook=24, arsenal=17)

beta_rarity_ord.note: BA-02 uses rarity as a GROUPING VARIABLE in the 3-level hierarchy (card <- set <- rarity), not as a linear covariate. No beta_rarity_ord exists in the BA-02 PyMC model — rarity is encoded in mu_rarity[r] hyperpriors. For gradient boosting (XGBoost/LightGBM), rarity_ord is an explicit input feature with no prior needed. This entry documents the expected direction for reference.
beta_rarity_ord.source: CDA NB01 H1: eps2=0.396 (LARGE); monotonic EUR gradient confirmed; BA-04 H3: rare vs uncommon +0.576 log-units (BF10>1000)

beta_in_tournament.note: Selection bias caveat: in_tournament=True cards are pre-selected to be expensive (MTGGoldfish tracks most-played = most expensive). The 6.9x premium partly reflects scraper design. Within-tournament gradient (top8_appearances_30d) is bias-free.
beta_in_tournament.source: EDA NB03: 6.9x premium (r=+0.279, selection-biased); CDA NB03 H1 confirmed

beta_log1p_top8_appearances_30d.note: Applied to log1p(top8_appearances_30d). Zero for non-tournament cards (fill_0). Sparse feature: 0.5% coverage. Within-tournament gradient is bias-free unlike in_tournament binary.
beta_log1p_top8_appearances_30d.source: CDA NB03 H1: 4.5x gradient (0 appearances EUR0.96 -> 16+ appearances EUR7.99); Spearman r=+0.279 within tournament set

beta_mana_value.note: Applied after cap at 16 and median-per-rarity imputation. Raw Spearman ~0 (confounded by rarity). Signal emerges only within rarity: lower CMC = higher price (efficiency premium).
beta_mana_value.source: EDA NB04: partial Spearman -0.259 within rarity (genuine signal after rarity control)

beta_color_identity_count.note: Applied to bucketed feature (0=colorless / 1=mono / 2=two-color / 3+=multi). Gradient is NOT monotone: colorless (0) is highest due to Power Nine and Eldrazi. Wide prior centered at 0 to let data determine shape.
beta_color_identity_count.source: CDA NB05 H1: eps2=0.0199; colorless EUR0.46 > multi EUR0.43 > two EUR0.30 > mono EUR0.24

beta_primary_type.note: One-hot encoded with 'Creature' as reference category. Low-priority feature (eps2=0.0306 < 0.05 threshold; MP-02 P-21). Prior mus derived from CDA NB05 H2 median log-unit deltas relative to Creature (EUR 0.22).

Planeswalker.source: CDA NB05 H2: EUR 1.94 vs 0.22; clearly distinct

Land.source: CDA NB05 H2: EUR 0.30 vs 0.22; Basic Lands pull median down

Instant.source: CDA NB05 H2: EUR 0.21 vs 0.22 (slightly below Creature)
